artifact: marketing/blog/{en-learn-japanese-from-manga, en-japanese-ocr-app, ru-yaponskiy-s-nulya, en-best-japanese-learning-app-offline, en-japanese-ai-tutor, ru-anki-alternativa-yaponskiy}.md (6 drafts, post-factcheck-fixes)

factcheck_round_2.method: External research specialist verification (user-provided), then in-article fixes applied by @marketer
fixes_applied: Manga article: removed non-existent 'Mieru' and 'Kaname' mentions; replaced with verified open-source stack (manga-ocr model, Poricom, YomiNinja) and mobile (KanjiSnap)
Manga article: corrected Yomitan framing — it's a dictionary extension, not OCR; needs external OCR for images

OCR article: replaced 'Imiwa, Akebi, Shirabe Jisho, Japanese by Renzo Inc.' headline — Shirabe Jisho and Akebi don't have confirmed OCR, 'Japanese by Renzo Inc.' doesn't exist. Now: Imiwa, Nihongo, KanjiSnap (all verified OCR). Added note that Akebi/Shirabe are excellent lookup tools without OCR.
OCR article: removed unverifiable accuracy percentages ('95%+', '80-90%') — replaced with qualitative framing + caveat about vendor-published numbers
AI tutor article: pricing updated to verified values — ChatGPT Plus/Claude Pro/Gemini Advanced ~$200/year (~$17/mo); Speak ~$30/mo; Talkpal ~$20/mo; Praktika ~$100/year
AI tutor article: softened '$30-60/hour human tutor' to 'tens of US dollars per hour and often much more'

verified_claims: manga-ocr (kha-white) — verified open-source library, multi-line manga OCR
Poricom (blueaxis) — verified desktop GUI for manga-ocr
YomiNinja (matt-m-o) — verified, pipes OCR into Yomitan/Yomichan
KanjiSnap (iOS) — verified, uses Apple Live Text
Yomitan — verified as dictionary extension, NOT OCR (framing corrected)
Yotsuba&! as beginner manga — canonical recommendation
2136 jōyō kanji — verified (MEXT official)
NDLOCR-Lite runs locally in Origa — verified (AGENTS.md)
Imiwa — verified iOS/Android dictionary with OCR
Nihongo — verified iOS/Android with OCR (Pro feature)
KanjiSnap — verified iOS OCR app
Akebi — verified Android dictionary (no confirmed OCR; framing reflects this)
Shirabe Jisho — verified popular dictionary (no confirmed OCR; framing reflects this)
Apple Live Text, Google Lens — verified shipping features
Accuracy claims — softened to qualitative; vendor numbers explicitly flagged as unreliable
2136 jōyō kanji — verified
Minna no Nihongo, Genki, Tae Kim's Guide — all real textbooks
Tae Kim Russian community translation — verified to exist (GitHub)
JLPT N5 ~100 kanji, ~800 words — community estimate; JLPT does not publish official vocab list (article reflects this)
Anki desktop + AnkiDroid free, AnkiWeb sync free — verified
WaniKani, Bunpro online-only — verified (web apps)
Origa local NDLOCR + Whisper — verified (AGENTS.md)
Duolingo offline = downloaded lessons only — verified
ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, Gemini Advanced — verified ~$200/year (~$17/month)
Speak — verified ~$30/month Premium Plus, supports Japanese
Talkpal — verified ~$20/month Premium, supports Japanese
Praktika — verified ~$100/year, supports Japanese
WaniKani, Bunpro pricing — NOT_FOUND in research; article intentionally vague (no specific numbers stated)
Anki FSRS 23.10/24.10 — verified (docs.ankiweb.net, inline citation present)
All competitor citations (wanikani.com, bunpro.jp, duolingo.com, migii) — inline
Origa .anki2/.anki21 import — verified

translation_status.note: All 6 drafts EN/RU only. After HUMAN GATE on tone, KO/VI translations to be produced with machine_translated + review_required pattern (same as existing 2 articles). Native KO/VI review still recommended before paid promotion on those markets.
translation_status.translation_workflow: 1) HUMAN GATE on tone → 2) migrate EN/RU to content/blog/{locale}/ + registry.rs ARTICLES + sitemap update → 3) KO/VI translation → 4) Script-consistency tests in tests/blog.rs → 5) Native review before KO/VI paid promotion

gate_summary: ALL 6 ARTICLES READY_FOR_HUMAN_REVIEW. Round-2 factcheck closed: removed non-existent products (Mieru, Kaname, Japanese by Renzo Inc.), softened unverifiable accuracy percentages, corrected Yomitan/Shirabe/Akebi framing, replaced estimated pricing with verified values. Remaining gate is tone/positioning approval from user, then KO/VI translation + migration to content/blog/.
